description: Privacy-safe scaffolding for a fresh build-loop-memory store. This manifest allowlists only generic templates and generated directories; it must not include personal lessons, project decisions, raw files, indexes, or operator-specific content.

sources.purpose: Generic rule scaffold for the installer's first-run constitution.
Generic global-memory index scaffold for first-run installs.

generated.purpose: Rebuildable local indexes created by install_memory.py.
Generic project-scoped memory lane guide generated by install_memory.py.
Empty raw-source lane placeholders created only when --ensure-project is passed.

privacy.rule: The public build-loop package ships templates and empty scaffolds only. Personal memory files, private repository contents, project-specific decisions, raw artifacts, generated indexes, and local operator paths are excluded.
